verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sing hallelujah to the King of kings, Sing hallelu, hallelu. Give Him the highest praise, Oh, magnify His name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sing hallelujah to the Lord of lords, Sing hallelu, hallelu. Sing Him the highest praise, Sing hallelu, hallelu.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will bless the Lord With all I have within, Forever His praise be in my mouth For He has lifted me Up to the heavenlies With Him, at the Father's side.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will bless the Lord With all I have within For He has made my heart so blessed; I will give Him the highest praise, I'll sing hallelu, hallelu.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Give Him the highest praise, I'll sing hallelu, hallelu.
